mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservations ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM reservations WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations (username, category, request_time, headcount, requirements, ticket_link, reference_url, image_url, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{category}, #{requestTime}, #{headcount}, #{requirements}, #{ticketLink}, #{referenceUrl}, #{imageUrl}, 'PENDING')
mapper.update: UPDATE reservations SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservations SET admin_comment = #{adminComment} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservations SET ticket_link = #{ticketLink} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE reservations SET category = #{category}, request_time = #{requestTime}, headcount = #{headcount}, requirements = #{requirements}, reference_url = #{referenceUrl}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, ticket_link = #{ticketLink}, admin_comment = #{adminComment}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
